text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during a meeting with Gold City...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! Can I borrow City for a photo shoot
right now?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Thought I didn't have work today...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I know, I'm sorry, but we need you! We've
planned a special feature showcasing
Umamusume in their signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
It'll benefit you as well. It's a chance to make a
whole new impression on the world!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I know. Hey, mind if I bring my trainer to the
studio?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There'll be downtime while everyone's setting up
the equipment, so we can continue with our
meeting then, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up accompanying Gold City to the studio to
continue our meeting.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay. That's our strategy settled—all that's left is
to put it into action.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... there's also the photo shoot before that.

text_block_list.name: Stylist
text_block_list.text:
Oh, City. I like your signature racewear. Is the
jacket inspired by biker fashion?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it is.

text_block_list.name: Stylist
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! So tell me—what's the concept behind
the design?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, something I want to try? Anyway, I'm off to
the shoot now.

text_block_list.name: Stylist
text_block_list.text:
Heh, way to evade my question. Good luck
though!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: What is it that you want to try?
What is it that you want to try?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh, was it not clear enough I was trying to keep
that vague?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It does have to do with motorcycles—the feeling
of being able to go wherever you want, the wind
rushing past.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
See, for this one show a while back, I had to wear
this biker-inspired outfit.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't sure how to approach the catwalk, so I
asked one of the staff members who was into
motorcycles.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
When you're on a bike, you're totally exposed,
right? The wind blows right into your face. In
winter, it hurts like hell, and it's freezing cold.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But then, that's how you know you're moving
forward... I just thought that was kinda cool.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And of course, it's on two wheels, so if you don't
keep moving, you fall. Or you use the kickstand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Never. I mean, I'm a model. I'm just going off of
what that staff member told me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My contract actually like forbids me from riding
one, to prevent the risk of accidents or whatever.
choice_data_list: No motorcycle could match your stride anyway.
No motorcycle could match your stride anyway.
I'll take you on a ride one day.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My contract actually like forbids me from riding
one, to prevent the risk of accidents or whatever.
choice_data_list: No motorcycle could match your stride anyway.
No motorcycle could match your stride anyway.
I'll take you on a ride one day.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, please. Where'd you pick up a line like that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't tell if you were trying to sound cool or cheer me up or what, but those words did not belong in your mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly afterward, the photographer calls Gold
City in for the photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Great job today! The photographer was really
impressed with you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Great, but let's not do this again. Like, it's cool if
you need me for whatever, but today was way too
sudden.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... I'm sorry. But you looked really good! It
was a side of you I'd never seen before.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Did something good happen before the shoot?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Before the shoot?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "No motorcycle could match your stride anyway."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "No motorcycle could match your stride anyway."

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: Something did happen, didn't it?! Whatever it was, can you make that a part of your prep routine?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You always have to push the envelope... Let's all
get out of here, yeah? We've got tomorrow too,
so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City blushes a little more than usual as she
speaks.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you will? Haha... What exactly do you mean
by that?

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: All right, let's start the shoot!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Coming.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I want to run back to the academy.
You can drop me off when we get to the
riverside, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the photo shoot, on the way back to the
school...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroooom!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... A motorcycle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey... About what you said before.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: How serious were you?
